title: Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXXX. Love And Matrimony.
content:
Up street, and down street,
            Each window's made of glass;
        If you go to Tommy Tickler's house,
            You'll find a pretty lass.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. CCCCLXXX. Love And Matrimony." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
